caption: A man with a distinct, tall, grey-white stylized hairdo sits in a podcast studio, wearing glasses, a white button-down shirt, a small red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with various framed photographs and clothing items hanging on a rack. On-screen text appears in two locations: a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK" above the word "PODCAST" and a red logo on the right that says "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains mostly stationary, though he slightly shifts his gaze and expression while looking toward the left side of the frame. The camera remains still, capturing him from the chest up in a medium shot as he engages in the recording session.
